notes.create-first: Click + to create your first note

syncEnabled.label: Enable GitHub Gist sync
syncEnabled.desc: Automatically sync notes to a private gist after changes.

githubToken.label: GitHub Token
githubToken.desc: Personal access token with gist permission.
githubToken.help: The plugin creates or reuses a private gist named `noctalia-sticky-notes`. Each note is stored as one file whose filename is the note id.

errors.missing-token: GitHub token is required before syncing.
